bull.b: Ocugen has multiple late-stage ophthalmic programs with completed enrollments and positive 12‑month Phase 2 data showing a 31% lesion reduction. Successful regulatory submissions or approvals would create durable, one-time gene therapy revenue streams and reposition the company from research to potential commercial exe

bull.t: Extended Cash Runway Via Convertible Notes
bull.b: The $130M convertible notes issuance materially improves near‑term liquidity, repays higher‑cost debt and extends runway into 2028. This financing reduces immediate refinancing pressure, supports late‑stage development and planned regulatory filings, and provides time to de‑risk programs before needing new capital.

Board elections, auditor ratification and formal appointment of the CMO strengthen governance and clinical oversight. Stable leadership and independent audit support consistent regulatory interactions, trial execution and investor confidence—important for long‑term development and commercialization of complex gene ther

bear.b: The company remains deeply unprofitable with recurring negative operating and free cash flow across periods. Sustained cash burn forces ongoing dependence on external financing and creates execution risk if future capital markets access or milestone funding becomes constrained, limiting long‑term financial resilience.

bear.t: Stressed Balance Sheet And Negative Equity
bear.b: Rising leverage and negative trailing equity in 2025 signal weakened solvency and reduced buffers against adverse outcomes. High debt-to-equity and declining assets constrain strategic optionality, increase refinancing vulnerability and heighten risk of dilutive or expensive future financings over the medium term.

The convertible issuance improves liquidity but creates meaningful potential equity dilution if conversions occur. Dilution can materially erode existing shareholders' stake and reduce per‑share economics from future drug revenues, and conversion terms may affect capital structure and incentives over multiple years.
